strengths: Direct, current experience building "AI-agent infrastructure" and "frameworks that support agentic workflows," aligning perfectly with the core agentic AI architecture responsibility.
Deep, demonstrated expertise in high-performance distributed systems, including microservices handling millions of requests per second (Dunnhumby) and event-driven platforms (GISCollective).

Possesses direct fintech industry experience (RIDE Capital) and a track record of proactive technical leadership through founding open-source projects and creating/delivering numerous technical workshops.
concerns: The resume shows a career path of senior individual contributor roles (Staff Engineer) rather than formal executive leadership, lacking experience with board-level communication or departmental P&L.
There is no evidence of scaling an engineering organization from 10 to 30+ people, a required qualification for the role.
Experience with outsourced engineering models appears limited to freelance and consulting work, not the required governance frameworks for external delivery partners.
response.justification: Bogdan is a compelling candidate due to his rare and highly relevant experience building the foundational infrastructure for agentic AI systems, a core requirement of this CTO role. This expertise is built upon a deep, proven foundation in architecting high-throughput, low-latency distributed systems and event-driven platforms, as demonstrated at Dunnhumby and through his GISCollective project. His direct experience in fintech at RIDE Capital provides valuable domain context. While his background is in senior technical leadership rather than formal people management, his initiative in founding projects and leading extensive technical training showcases a strong aptitude for mentorship and building an engineering culture of excellence, suggesting high upside as an organizational leader.
